Removed_Network.purpose: Ensures players receive relevant prompts when launching games, improving engagement.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagDebugRetainRegalReceipt_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Keeps a record of specific transaction receipts for debugging.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers troubleshoot issues with purchases, ensuring smoother transactions for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string value related to the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and updates in the game more efficiently.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how dynamic strings with timestamps are displayed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides players with more accurate and timely information in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Speeds up the loading and updating process for developers, ensuring smoother game updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling by flipping timestamps for faster processing.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and responsiveness in games that rely on time-based string data.
